story.title: GPT-5.6 used a prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization

draft:
GPT-5.6 just closed a 30-year gap in convex optimization with a single prompt. 
I'm intrigued by the potential of AI to solve complex math problems. 
GPT-5.6's ability to fill this gap raises questions about future applications.
Can AI consistently drive breakthroughs in math and science?
#AIforMath #ConvexOptimization #GPT56
